* The function calculates the total rainfall by summing all elements in the list.  
* The function divides the total rainfall by the number of weeks (12) to get the weekly average.  
* The function multiplies the weekly average by 4.345 to convert to monthly rainfall.  
* The function returns a float representing the average monthly rainfall.  
* The function ensures that the input list contains exactly 12 elements.  
* The function handles cases where the input list has fewer or more than 12 elements.  
* The function avoids rounding errors by using floating-point arithmetic.
